name: Leaderboard
details: A score submission and ranking system. Users submit their own scores, admins can update anyone's score. A ranked table displays all entries sorted by score descending. Demonstrates ownerField for 'own' permission checks, userBound fields, and admin override for full CRUD.
instructions: Add to schemas.ts: import { leaderboardSchema } from './schemas/leaderboard-schema'
Add to App.tsx: import LeaderboardPage from './pages/LeaderboardPage'
patterns: userBound: true → auto-populates with current user ID
